title: Advisory Board
description: 35 distinguished business, government and education leaders are serving on Duke Kunshan’s Advisory Board, a voluntary non-governing group that provides strategic guidance to the DKU leadership.
text:
About Duke Kunshan
Advisory Board
36 distinguished business, government and education leaders are serving on Duke Kunshan’s Advisory Board, a voluntary non-governing group that provides strategic guidance to the Duke Kunshan leadership. Chaired by Zhang Yichen, Chairman and CEO of CITIC Capital, each member of the advisory board is deeply committed to improving educational opportunities for future generations of students in China and around the world.
